consortium_crate::dag::cache

Trait CacheStrategy 

Source 
pub trait CacheStrategy:
    Send
    + Sync
    + 'static {
    // Required method
    fn check(
        &self,
        task_id: &TaskId,
        ctx: &DagContext,
    ) -> Option<Box<dyn Any + Send>>;
}
Expand description

Trait for determining whether a task can be skipped.

Implementors check external state (nix store, file system, etc.) and return the cached output if available.

Required Methods§

Source

fn check( &self, task_id: &TaskId, ctx: &DagContext, ) -> Option<Box<dyn Any + Send>>

Check if the task’s output already exists. Returns Some(output) if cached (task will be skipped), None if the task must execute.

Implementors§

Source§

impl CacheStrategy for NoCache
